violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (dough machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

(Pasta), which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hhttps://ri.mydhd.com/_icons/controls/control__bw_add.pngours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours.PIC voluntarily disposed of pasta. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep units, prep table shelves and exterior of dough roller ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
The (walls ) in the (throughout establishment) is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (dough machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024

The presence of (rodents) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024

The following non food contact surfaces observed with debris: 1.fans in walk in cooler have dust 2.fans in kitchen have an accumulation of dust. 3.prep tables shelves in pasta room have food and debris. 4.stove hoods observed with dust and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024
